title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences

Announcements

27
						October

2021

Within the scope of

PROMES ®

(Project Oriented Innovative Engineering Research and Education System) engineering students from all classes will be selected to participate in industry-supported and supervised project in their courses.

In the 2018-2019 academic year, only students in the

Computer, Software, Electrical and Electronis, Industrial, Mechanical,  Mechatronics, Automotive, Civil Engineering and Genetics-Bioengineering

programs will participate in PROMES ®.

Students, with

at least 2,20 CGPA

, and studying in any year of the programs listed above, who wish to participate in PROMES® projects must apply by

Monday, November 8, 17:00 hrs

, to Ms. Ayşegül Özdemir, Dean’s secretary, to have their names and contact information recorded.

Those who have already applied do not have to re-apply.
